name: ble-scale-sync
desc: Universal BLE Smart Scale bridge. Captures body composition from Renpho, Xiaomi & 20+ others, syncs to Garmin Connect, Strava, MQTT (Home Assistant), InfluxDB,…
descFull: Universal BLE Smart Scale bridge. Captures body composition from Renpho, Xiaomi & 20+ others, syncs to Garmin Connect, Strava, MQTT (Home Assistant), InfluxDB, Webhooks, Ntfy & local files (CSV/JSONL). Headless CLI for Raspberry Pi, Linux, macOS & Windows.
